description: Set the value of parameters that affect the entire model, as well as parameters related to solving and saving.

keywords.name: base-fragment-size
keywords.description: Set Base Fragment Size. The default value is 0.05.

keywords.name: compute-days
keywords.description: Set number of days the massflow compute command is going to solve. Alternatively, compute-period can be set.

keywords.name: compute-period
keywords.description: Set number of periods the massflow compute command is going to solve. Alternatively, compute-days can be set.

keywords.name: filename
keywords.description: Set the filename prefix for generated save files. If not given, it will default to “massflow”.

keywords.name: imz-update
keywords.description: Set the frequency of updating the IMZ geometries. By default, the IMZs are updated every two days.

keywords.name: layer-thickness
keywords.description: Set slice thickness of the Isolated Movement Zone (IMZ). This is a multiplier relative to the Mine Block size. The default value is 0.5, meaning the slice thickness is half the Mine Block size.

keywords.name: massbalance-lower
keywords.description: Set the lower limit for massbalance correction factor. Default is 0.1.

keywords.name: massbalance-upper
keywords.description: Set the upper limit for massbalance correction factor. Default is 2.

keywords.name: percent-empty
keywords.description: Set fraction of Mine Block volume that must be empty before adding air. The default value is 0.75.

keywords.name: rill-days
keywords.description: Set how often, in days, rilling calculations are performed. Default is 1.

keywords.name: save-days
keywords.description: Set how often, in days, save files will be created. Alternatively, save-period can be set.

keywords.name: save-period
keywords.description: Set how often, in periods, save files will be created. Alternatively, save-days can be set.

keywords.name: tensile-ucs-ratio
keywords.description: Set ratio of tensile strength to unconfined compressive strength. The default value is 0.1.
